ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant but lacks naturalness and persona consistency due to the formal tone used by a merchant in such situations.
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>A generic answer that fails on all fronts, not relevant or consistent with any context and persona; also lacks naturalness due to its impersonal tone.

The response is highly relevant, consistent with a merchant persona who understands security protocols and provides an appropriate answer that maintains naturalness in dialogue while ensuring the player knows they need proper clearance.
